title: Bheemla Nayak
desc: Danny, a former soldier, is arrested by SI Nayak for a drunken fight. Danny uses his political connections to get Nayak suspended. They become enemies and vow revenge.

title: Anaconda
desc: Terry and her team rescue Paul who leads them to the hideout of the dreaded Anaconda, instead of the tribe they are in search of.

title: Ismart Shankar
desc: Ismart Shankar, a killer, murders a politician. A cop, Arun, investigates but dies. Arun's memory is transferred into Shankar to solve the case.

title: Luck
desc: Follow the story of kingpin Karim Musa for who gambling and drug smuggling are passe. His latest interest is investing in other's luck.

title: Ek Tsunami Jwalamukhi
desc: This explosive drama blends metaphor and disaster imagery to explore emotional upheaval and human resilience, capturing the intensity of life-altering choices and consequences.

title: Vardiwala The Iron Man
desc: Is Airavata a real or fake cop? Will he be able to eradicate all the negativity and violence of Pratap Kale and make a corruption free society

title: Marjaavan
desc: Raghu, a loyal gangster, earns the trust of local don Narayan Anna, becoming his favourite. But envy brews in Narayan's son Vishnu, who plots to bring Raghu down and reclaim his father's attention.

title: Gurudev Hoysala
desc: Moral police inspector Gurudev Hoysala transfers to Athani to investigate a missing officer. Soon, a mysterious young couple complicates his search for justice and truth.

title: Ongala Podanum Sir
desc: A group of quirky housemates juggle spooky experiences and comedic moments while chasing jobs, relationships, and laughter under one unpredictable, haunted roof.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.
